name: Mike Myers
blurb: Creator of Wayne's World and later Austin Powers.
bio: Mike Myers is a Canadian comedian and actor who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1989 to 1995, where he co-created Wayne's World with Dana Carvey. He went on to the Austin Powers and Shrek franchises.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
